questions.question: Which dynasty was responsible for building the famous Konark Sun Temple in Odisha?
questions.explanation: The Eastern Ganga Dynasty constructed the Konark Sun Temple in the 13th century, showcasing their patronage of art and architecture.

questions.question: The Battle of Kalinga, which led to Emperor Ashoka's conversion to Buddhism, was fought in which year?
questions.explanation: The Kalinga War was fought in 261 BCE, after which Ashoka embraced Buddhism and promoted peace.

questions.question: Who was the leader of the famous Paika Rebellion against British rule in Odisha?
questions.explanation: Buxi Jagabandhu led the Paika Rebellion of 1817-1818 against the British in Odisha.

questions.question: The formation of Odisha as a separate state was achieved in which year?
questions.explanation: Odisha was officially formed as a separate province on April 1, 1936.

questions.question: Which dynasty was predominantly ruling Odisha during the 14th century?
questions.explanation: The Gajapati dynasty ruled Odisha in the 14th century, known for their cultural and military achievements.

questions.question: Which river is the longest in Odisha?
questions.explanation: The Mahanadi River is the longest river flowing through Odisha.

questions.question: Chilika Lake, the largest coastal lagoon in India, is located in which district of Odisha?
questions.explanation: Chilika Lake is mainly situated in Ganjam district, though it spans multiple districts.

questions.question: Which mineral is most abundantly found in Odisha?
questions.explanation: Odisha is rich in iron ore deposits, making it a major supplier for the steel industry.

questions.question: The Eastern Ghats primarily pass through which part of Odisha?
questions.explanation: The Eastern Ghats run through the southern part of Odisha.

questions.question: Which major port is located in Odisha?
questions.explanation: Paradip Port is one of the major ports located in Odisha, dedicated to handling bulk cargo.

questions.question: The famous Jagannath Temple is located in which Odisha city?
questions.explanation: The Jagannath Temple is situated in Puri, and is a major pilgrimage site.

questions.question: The Sun Temple at Konark is dedicated to which deity?
questions.explanation: The Sun Temple at Konark is dedicated to Lord Surya, the Sun God.

questions.question: Odissi dance is believed to have originated from which region of Odisha?
questions.explanation: Odissi dance originated from the temples of Puri and its surrounding regions.

questions.question: Pattachitra art is primarily associated with which art form?
questions.explanation: Pattachitra is a traditional cloth-based scroll painting art form of Odisha.

questions.question: Which festival is celebrated to mark the harvest in Odisha?
questions.explanation: Nuakhai is the harvest festival celebrated mainly in western Odisha.

questions.question: Which organization is a major player in aluminium production in Odisha?
questions.explanation: National Aluminium Company Limited (NALCO) is a key aluminium producer in Odisha.

questions.question: Paradip Port is primarily used for which type of cargo?
questions.explanation: Paradip Port is a major port mainly used for container and bulk cargo handling.

questions.question: Which government scheme aims to improve livelihood of farmers in Odisha?
questions.explanation: KALIA scheme is launched specifically to support and improve farmers' income in Odisha.

questions.question: The Odisha budget is presented in which legislative body?
questions.explanation: The Odisha Budget is presented in the Odisha Legislative Assembly.

questions.question: Who is the constitutional head of Odisha state government?
questions.explanation: The Governor is the constitutional head of Odisha state.

questions.question: The Odisha State Legislative Assembly has how many elected members?
questions.explanation: Odisha Legislative Assembly has 147 elected members.

questions.question: Which local self-government system is most prominent in Odisha?
questions.explanation: Panchayati Raj is the most prominent form of local self-governance in rural Odisha.

questions.question: The 73rd Amendment Act in India pertains to which aspect related to Odisha?
questions.explanation: The 73rd Amendment pertains to strengthening Panchayati Raj institutions in Odisha and other states.

questions.question: Which is the main component of the atmosphere in Odisha?
questions.explanation: Nitrogen makes up about 78% of the Earth's atmosphere, including in Odisha.

questions.question: Which gas is primarily responsible for the greenhouse effect, relevant to Odisha's climate?
questions.explanation: Carbon dioxide is the main greenhouse gas contributing to global warming and climate change.

questions.question: Which type of soil is mostly found in the coastal regions of Odisha?
questions.explanation: Alluvial soil is common in Odisha's coastal plains due to river deposits.

questions.question: Which part of the human body is most affected by the deficiency of iodine in Odisha?
questions.explanation: Iodine deficiency leads to goiter, affecting the thyroid gland.

questions.question: Which scheme was launched recently by Odisha government to provide free health insurance?
questions.explanation: Biju Swasthya Kalyan Yojana was launched to provide free health insurance to Odisha residents.

questions.question: The KALIA scheme in Odisha primarily aims to support which group?
questions.explanation: KALIA scheme is aimed at supporting farmers and farm workers in Odisha.

questions.question: In the context of Odisha, 'Mo Sarkar' is a scheme related to:
questions.explanation: 'Mo Sarkar' is a scheme for better governance through direct citizen feedback.
